name: Unicorn Kids' Hooded Blanket - Pillowfort™: Faux Fur, Machine Washable, OEKO-TEX Certified, Pink & White, 50"x40"
description: Help your kiddo stay cozy in fun style with this Animal Hooded Blanket from Pillowfort™. Complete with an attached tail and a plush animal head on the hood, this animal blanket adds a fierce vibe to their blanket collection. Designed with faux fur, this blanket feels so soft while cuddling whether they're playing or just being cozy while reading.
